chapter_title: Example ecology discussion brief: biodiversity measures, nesting habitat and landscape context
purpose: Demonstrate how a chapter profile gathers claim cards for a writing task from a single parsed markdown paper.

sections.heading: Core result: biodiversity measures and colony density
sections.writing_goal: Summarize the main modelled effects on Bombus terrestris colony density.
queries: biodiversity measures significant positive effect number of colonies pollen nectar food resources nesting habitat

sections.heading: Landscape context and semi-natural habitats
sections.writing_goal: Explain how semi-natural habitats and landscape composition modify measure effectiveness.
queries: semi-natural habitats landscape composition context modifies effect colony density strongest weakest effect

sections.heading: Model limitations and caution
sections.writing_goal: Surface limitations that must constrain interpretation.
queries: limitation model phenology annual variation grassland forest not defined food nesting habitats underestimated

avoid: Do not use candidate or page-check claims as final publication evidence without review.
Do not generalize beyond the source geography, methodology or study organism/case.
